text:
Stephen Hurd wrote:
> The following reply was made to PR ports/113072; it has been noted by GNATS.
>
>  Hrm... the minor changes seem to be to not install the manpage, icon or 
>  the .desktop file... is there a reason the install target in the 
>  included makefile can't be used?
>
>   

Hi Developer!
Sorry, inside your patch not exist manpage to install.
Also to install ICONS and DESKTOP files is necessary to check if exist
any WINDOW MANAGER installed on your system.

Well, I can re-open your PR and wait your patch!
I'm waiting your feedback about it.


Best Regards.
